category_sources: Official GitHub README says Serie is a TUI application for rendering commit graphs like git log --graph --all.
source_facts.description says Rich git commit graph in your terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Serie.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the full documentation at lusingander.github.io/serie for usage, configuration, and advanced features.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lusingander/serie; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include git, cli, terminal, tui, git-client, git-tools, git-log, and git-graph.
source_facts.description mentions a rich git commit graph in the terminal.
